title: RERA Authorities is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: RERA Authorities is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
